creator: commit-hook@FreeBSD.org
text:
A commit references this bug:

Author: pi
Date: Tue May 24 11:42:06 UTC 2016
New revision: 415781
URL: https://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/415781

Log:
  net/krdc: remove FreeBSD 8 compatibility patch

  The patch was introduced in r374162 in the official ports tree, but
  is no longer relevant since FreeBSD 8 reached EOL.

  PR:		209695
  Submitted by:	groot@kde.org (kde)
  Originally-by: tcberner

Changes:
  head/net/krdc/files/patch-vnc__vncclientthread.cpp
